name: Vegetable Spam Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
2 small Tomatoes, peeled and finely diced
1/2 cup House of Tsang Ginger Soy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly coat a 13x9-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
3. Cut the squash in half lengthwise. Scoop out the seeds and place the squash, cut sides down, in the pan.
4. Bake for 40 minutes or until tender. Meanwhile, in a large skillet over medium-high heat, sauté SPAM for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from the skillet.
5. Add bell pepper, jicama, onion, tomato, and pepper to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add ginger soy sauce and bring to a boil. Return the SPAM to the skillet and heat thoroughly.
7. Fill each squash cavity with the SPAM mixture. Sprinkle with green onion.
